items.title: US and Iran trade attacks as Khamenei is buried
items.summary: Centcom says it hit 90 Iranian targets in the latest round of strikes, with the Iranian health ministry saying 14 people were killed since Tuesday.

items.title: Ukraine strikes Russian ships near Crimea, escalating attacks on fuel supplies
items.summary: The attacks appear to be the latest phase of Ukraine's bid to choke off supplies and routes into and out of occupied Crimea.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 美國務院回應國台辦批評：指控無根據、谷立言代表美立場
items.summary: 中國國台辦日前批評美國在台協會（AIT）處長谷立言，美國國務院今天回覆中央社記者提問表示，中方指控毫無根據，谷立言完全代表美政府立場；美國對台政策並未改變，支持台灣獲取關鍵防衛能力，並持續敦...…

items.title: 涉策劃馬克宏訪問期間爆炸案 敘利亞逮捕IS相關組織
items.summary: 敘利亞官員9日表示，該國已抓獲1個與「伊斯蘭國」（IS）有關聯的恐怖組織，該組織涉嫌策劃本週早些時候法國總統馬克宏訪問首都大馬士革期間發生的2起爆炸事件。  根據《法新社》...…
